productDisplayName: Nike Men Town Navy Blue T-Shirts
description: Composition Navy blue round neck t-shirt with short sleeves, made of 100% cotton, has fabric tape detailing on the inseam of the neckline, graphic print on the front, and nike Swoosh printed on the left sleeve Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water at 30 degrees with like colours Do not use bleach or softeners Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Tumble dry low Cool iron Do not iron directly on print/trims/ logo Do not dry clean When you're in the mood to look casual and hip, try this navy blue t-shirt from nike. You just cannot go wrong in this tee, what with its clean silhouette and attractive graphic print. Perfect for all-day wear. Pair it with jeans or shorts and walk around in style.
